arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola dismisses FA Cup Final theory in honest verdict on Man City vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola dismissed the notion that winning the FA Cup would mean more to Crystal Palace – and said Manchester City are determined to leave Wembley with the famous trophy

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner to ditch lucky omen for Crystal Palace's FA Cup Final vs Man City
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has worn a black Hugo Boss jumper on their run to Crystal Palace's third FA Cup final - and Eagles fans will hope it will be third time lucky when they face Manchester City

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner insists FA Cup triumph would 'mean more' to Crystal Palace as Eagles bid to upset Man City at Wembley and land maiden silverware
arts.sum: Palace go to Wembley in search of the club's first major trophy with most neutrals cheering them on against City, the dominating force in English football for nine years under Guardiola.

arts.ttl: MARTIN KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: How genius Kevin De Bruyne can pull Crystal Palace out of shape and end his Man City career with an FA Cup medal around his neck
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne is the ultimate professional who will do whatever the manager asks, but he deserves to play at Wembley and end his Man City career with a medal round his neck.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs. Man City: Best stats ahead of 2025 FA Cup final
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes a look at the best stats relating to Crystal Palace vs. Manchester City ahead of Saturday's FA Cup final at Wembley Stadium.

arts.ttl: GRAEME SOUNESS: Pep Guardiola doesn't know which version of Man City will turn up. Here's why they are so vulnerable to a Crystal Palace upset in the FA Cup final
arts.sum: GRAEME SOUNESS: As Pep Guardiola walks out at Wembley on Saturday, he does not know what version of Manchester City will turn up. And that's a horrible position to be in as a manager.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace injury news: Latest Adam Wharton update delivered by Oliver Glasner before Man City FA Cup final
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner confirms whether midfielder Adam Wharton will be fit to play in Saturday's FA Cup final against Manchester City at Wembley Stadium.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs. Man City: Erling Haaland seeking to end unwanted scoring record in FA Cup final
arts.sum: Erling Haaland will endeavour to end an unwanted personal scoring record when Manchester City take on Crystal Palace in the FA Cup final at Wembley Stadium on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs. Man City: Pep Guardiola bidding to match Sir Alex Ferguson record ahead of "massively important" FA Cup final
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola will attempt to draw level with Sir Alex Ferguson in achieving an impressive record when Manchester City face Crystal Palace in Saturday's FA Cup final at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Ruben Dias sends Crystal Palace "very dangerous" warning ahead of FA Cup final
arts.sum: Manchester City have struggled for much of this season, but defender Ruben Dias warned Crystal Palace they are "dangerous" once again ahead of their FA Cup final showdown
